headline: Fortive (NYSE:FTV) Beats Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations
summary: Industrial technology company Fortive (NYSE:FTV) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 7.7% year on year to $1.07 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.70 per share was 8.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
